dataSource.staticValue:
Hospitals Admissions Analysis
About this sample

This sample dashboard showcases two newly introduced reporting capabilities: brushing‑based interactivity, which allows selecting a hospital to instantly refresh the entire view and focus on that selection with a single click (and clearing it by holding Ctrl and clicking again), and the use of LAG and LEAD functions to display previous and next period values within the same row, making period‑over‑period comparisons easier and more intuitive.

detailFilter.filterExpression: [C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')

[C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')

[C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')

[C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')

[C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')

[C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')

[C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')

dataItem.name: Admission_Previous_Year
dataItem.expression: total ( case when [C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[Year_] = maximum([C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[Year_]-1 for report) then [C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[Count_] else 0 end )

dataItem.name: Admission_Current_Year
dataItem.expression: total ( case when [C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[Year_] = maximum([C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[Year_] for report) then [C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[Count_] else 0 end )

detailFilter.filterExpression: [C].[C_Hospital_admissions_data_module].[Admissions_1].[FacilityName] in ('Albion Heights General Hospital','Charles Street Health Centre','Finch Regional Hospital','Greene Urban Hospital','Leslie General Hospital')
